title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Meesho Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Meesho Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Meesho Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Meesho Logistics:
Meesho Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
